item.title: AlgoExpert Longest Peak
item.author: Author
item.description: This challenge is not difficult; however, I make a mistake when analyzing the time complexity. The reason is that I make a large duplicate and useless calculation in my solution. Take a look into the detail for the challenge “Longest Peak”. Writeup You can see the detail of challenge and my initial solution in this video. However, I can finish this problem in O(n) in fact. Why? Assume there is ten numbers in array:
